# Astro Sveltia Cloudflare

Multilingual marketing website boilerplate with Astro, Sveltia CMS, and Cloudflare Pages.

## Core Pages

- Homepage, About, Services, Pricing, Contact, Blog, Documentation

## Stack

- Astro (static site generator)
- Sveltia CMS (content editing via browser)
- Cloudflare Pages + D1 + R2 (deployment and storage)
